# Test: External API versioning and lifecycle in catalog
#
# This scenario verifies:
# 1. Registering an external API with --version and --lifecycle populates catalog correctly
# 2. Stable versions set latest_stable in catalog
# 3. Prerelease versions set latest_prerelease in catalog
# 4. Lifecycle state persists through catalog generation

# Setup: Create a canonical repo
mkdir canonical
cd canonical
exec git init
exec apx init canonical --org=testorg --repo=apis --skip-git --non-interactive

# Register an external API with stable version
exec apx external register proto/google/pubsub/v1 --managed-repo github.com/Infoblox-CTO/apis-contrib-google --managed-path google/pubsub/v1 --upstream-repo github.com/googleapis/googleapis --upstream-path google/pubsub/v1 --version v1.0.0 --lifecycle stable
stdout 'Registered external API'

# Generate catalog (which merges externals)
exec apx catalog generate
stdout 'external'

# Verify catalog contains version and lifecycle
exec cat catalog/catalog.yaml
stdout 'proto/google/pubsub/v1'
stdout 'latest_stable: v1.0.0'
stdout 'lifecycle: stable'
stdout 'origin: external'
! stdout 'latest_prerelease'

# Register a second external API with prerelease version
exec apx external register proto/google/api/v1 --managed-repo github.com/Infoblox-CTO/apis-contrib-google --managed-path google/api --upstream-repo github.com/googleapis/googleapis --upstream-path google/api --version v1.1.0-beta.1 --lifecycle beta
stdout 'Registered external API'

# Regenerate catalog
exec apx catalog generate

# Verify prerelease version is tracked in latest_prerelease
exec cat catalog/catalog.yaml
stdout 'proto/google/api/v1'
stdout 'latest_prerelease: v1.1.0-beta.1'
stdout 'lifecycle: beta'

# Verify the search command shows version info
exec apx search --origin external
stdout 'pubsub'
stdout 'api'
